description: 34 patches across FolderSync, Hidrate Spark, Meetup, Met Office, Tinder, and X, plus universal PairIP license-check bypass and universal OneTrust consent-banner auto-reject. v1.0.2 adds the universal OneTrust banner suppression (persists 'Banner - Reject All' and no-ops the setupUI render path so the popup can't slip through on relaunch) and Tinder's in-house TCF consent-prompt suppression; supersedes the Meetup-only cookie-banner patch. Purchase-breaking Tinder paywall patches and the native-PairIP-blocked X (12.4.1) patches are default-off.
